response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio matches the provided reference lyrics. Used on-screen lyrics as primary visual confirmation.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided reference lyrics as a spelling guide, but manually segmented and adjusted the timecodes to ensure precise alignment with the actual vocal tracks. Removed instrumental and transition sections where no vocals are present (e.g., during the guitar solo from 01:25 to 01:54, and transition/talk interlude from 02:53 to 03:45).
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual card '青のすみか' during the silent intro. Implemented precise start and end times to match the fast-tempo performances of 'only my railgun' and the emotive phrasing of 'Ao no Sumika'. Used instantaneous transitions and truncation where phrases flow together rapidly.

subtitles.original: 身体中を 光の速さで
subtitles.english: With the speed of light throughout my body...

subtitles.original: 駆け巡った 確かな予感
subtitles.english: An unshakeable premonition ran through me!

subtitles.original: 掴め！望むものなら残さず
subtitles.english: Grab it! Don't leave behind anything you wish for,

subtitles.original: 輝ける自分らしさで
subtitles.english: with a brilliance that is uniquely yours.

subtitles.original: 信じてるよ あの日の誓いを
subtitles.english: I believe in the promise of that day.

subtitles.original: この瞳に光る涙
subtitles.english: Even the tears that shine in these eyes...

subtitles.original: それさえも強さになるから
subtitles.english: will become my strength!

subtitles.original: 立ち止まると 少しだけ
subtitles.english: When I stand still, just a little,

subtitles.original: 感じる切なさに
subtitles.english: I feel a slight heartbreak.

subtitles.original: 戸惑う事
subtitles.english: To say that I'm not confused...

subtitles.original: 無いなんて嘘はつかないよ
subtitles.english: would be a lie.

subtitles.original: 宇宙に舞うコインが描く
subtitles.english: A coin dancing in space draws a curve,

subtitles.original: 放物線が決める運命
subtitles.english: creating a parabola that determines our fate.

subtitles.original: 打ち出した答えが今日も
subtitles.english: The answer I shot out today also...

subtitles.original: 私の胸を駆け巡る
subtitles.english: runs through my chest.

subtitles.original: Sparkling!
subtitles.english: Sparkling!

subtitles.original: The shiny lights awake true desire
subtitles.english: The shiny lights awake true desire.

subtitles.original: Only my railgun can shoot it 必ず
subtitles.english: Only my railgun can shoot it, definitely!

subtitles.original: 貫いてく 戸惑うことなく
subtitles.english: I will pierce through without hesitation,

subtitles.original: 傷ついても 走り続ける
subtitles.english: and keep running even if I get hurt!

subtitles.original: 狙え！凛と煌く視線は
subtitles.english: Aim! The cold and sparkling gaze...

subtitles.original: 狂い無く闇を切り裂く
subtitles.english: cuts through the darkness without fail.

subtitles.original: 迷いなんて 吹き飛ばせばいい
subtitles.english: Just blow away all of your hesitation!

subtitles.original: この心が叫ぶ限り
subtitles.english: As long as this heart continues to scream,

subtitles.original: 誰ひとり邪魔などさせない
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone get in my way!

subtitles.original: 儚く舞う 無数の願いは
subtitles.english: Countless fleetingly dancing wishes...

subtitles.original: この両手に 積もってゆく
subtitles.english: are piling up in these hands.

subtitles.original: 切り裂く闇に 見えてくるのは
subtitles.english: What comes into view through the split darkness...

subtitles.original: 重く深く 切ない記憶
subtitles.english: are heavy, deep, and painful memories.

subtitles.original: 色褪せてく 現実に揺れる
subtitles.english: Swaying in a fading reality,

subtitles.original: 絶望には 負けたくない防に
subtitles.english: I don't want to lose to despair.

subtitles.original: 私が今 私であること素なみぐに
subtitles.english: That I am who I am right now...

subtitles.original: 胸を張って 全て誇れる
subtitles.english: is something I can hold my head high and be proud of!

subtitles.original: Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way
subtitles.english: Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way.

subtitles.original: Only my railgun can shoot it 今すぐ
subtitles.english: Only my railgun can shoot it, right now!

subtitles.original: 身体中を 光の速さで
subtitles.english: With the speed of light throughout my body,

subtitles.original: 駆け巡った 確かな予感
subtitles.english: an unshakeable premonition ran through me.

subtitles.original: 放て！心に刻んだ夢を
subtitles.english: Let go! Of the dreams engraved in your heart,

subtitles.original: 未来さえ置き去りにして
subtitles.english: leaving even the future behind.

subtitles.original: 限界など知らない 意味無い！
subtitles.english: I don't know limits, it's meaningless!

subtitles.original: この能力が光散らす
subtitles.english: This power scatters light,

subtitles.original: その先に遥かな想いを
subtitles.english: sending my distant feelings far beyond.

subtitles.original: 青のすみか
subtitles.english: [Song: Ao no Sumika (Where Our Blue Is)]

subtitles.original: どこまでも続くような 青の季節は
subtitles.english: The season of blue that seems to last forever...

subtitles.original: 四つ並ぶ眼の前を 遮るものは何もない
subtitles.english: There is nothing blocking the front of our four pairs of eyes.

subtitles.original: アスファルト、蝉時雨を反射して
subtitles.english: Asphalt reflecting the chorus of cicadas...

subtitles.original: きみという沈黙が聞こえなくなる
subtitles.english: The silence called 'you' becomes completely inaudible.

subtitles.original: この日々が色褪せる
subtitles.english: These days are fading away,

subtitles.original: 僕と違うきみの匂いを知ってしまっても
subtitles.english: even if I've come to know your scent that is different from mine.

subtitles.original: 置き忘れてきた永遠の底に
subtitles.english: In the depths of eternity that we left behind,

subtitles.original: 今でも青が棲んでいる
subtitles.english: even now, the blue still dwells there.

subtitles.original: 今でも青は澄んでいる
subtitles.english: Even now, that blue remains so clear.

subtitles.original: どんな祈りも言葉も
subtitles.english: Any prayer or words,

subtitles.original: 近づけるのに、届かなかった
subtitles.english: although they got us closer, they never reached.

subtitles.original: まるで、静かな恋のような
subtitles.english: Just like a quiet, peaceful love,

subtitles.original: 頬を伝った夏のような色のなか
subtitles.english: inside a color that resembles summer tracing my cheeks...

subtitles.original: きみを呼ぶ言葉が、ずっと喉の奥につかえてる
subtitles.english: The words to call out to you are still stuck in the back of my throat.

subtitles.original: 「また会えるよね」って、声にならない声
subtitles.english: 'We will meet again, right?' in a voice that doesn't make a sound.
